## Summary

A clear one-line description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. Include API shape, config options, or code examples.

```javascript
// Proposed usage example
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've explored and why you chose this one.

## Additional Context

Links, references, or related issues.
